transcription.text: hey there folks it's me the extra crispy colonel now i love original recipe but in this sizzling summer heat i'm feeling a little extra crispy my extra crispy 20 philip is freshly double breaded and fried to a luxurious mouth-watering bronze extra crispy isn't just the product it's a lifestyle kfc it's extra crispy
